[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000100100 3
1 0000101001 3
2 0101010110 5
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0101001011 5

01 0101001011 5 match 7
12 1011110101 7
23 0110111111 8
34 1111011110 8

56 1111110110 8
67 1010101001 5
70 1111110110 8
